allow: PowerShell($apk = "C:\\Users\\40858\\repos\\setokai-inventory\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\release\\app-release.apk"; & "$env:JAVA_HOME\\bin\\jar.exe" tf $apk 2>$null | Out-Null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($apk\); $z.Entries | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Path=$_.FullName; Compressed=$_.CompressedLength; Original=$_.Length } } | Sort-Object -Property Compressed -Descending | Select-Object -First 25 | Format-Table -AutoSize; $z.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell($apk = "C:\\Users\\40858\\repos\\setokai-inventory\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\release\\app-release.apk"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($apk\); $z.Entries | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Path=$_.FullName; KB=[math]::Round\($_.CompressedLength/1KB,1\) } } | Sort-Object KB -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 | Format-Table -AutoSize; $z.Dispose\(\))
